REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-01-2010. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL PRESENT. COUNSEL, ELIZABETH MACDONALD, SPECIALLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE WAS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY WAS NOT FILED, SHE WAS NOT READY FOR TRIAL, AND SHE HAD NO AUTHORITY TO SETTLE THE CASE. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
